Normalise a list of bounding boxes

Source: R/helpers_subscription.R
normalise_bounding_boxes.Rd

Applies normalise_bounding_box() to each box in a non-empty list; boxes may overlap (AISStream de-duplicates server-side).

Usage

normalise_bounding_boxes(bounding_boxes)

Arguments

bounding_boxes

(list) a non-empty list of boxes, each in a shape normalise_bounding_box() accepts.

Value

(list) the list of canonical nested-corner boxes.
